calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Set A Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-23-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant UE Vision, Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Daniel Piccinini, Esq. appeared via CourtCall for plaintiff Showplace Square West, LLC.
Joe Vargo, Property Manager for Plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Mr. Vargo appeared via CourtCall for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant UE Vision, Inc.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Unlawful Detainer was filed on March 25, 2020 and personally served on defendant UE Vision, Inc.'s Authorized Agent of Process on April 2, 2019.
Default as to defendant UE Vision, Inc. was entered on October 15, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on December 13, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Showplace Square West, LLC, and against the defaulted defendant UE Vision, Inc., as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $29,006.80.
Holdover Damages - $22,278.72.
Attorney Fees - $4,000.00.
Costs - $680.00.

Total - $55,965.52.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Notice Of Motion To Set A Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-20-2020 Continued To Jul-23-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

Notice Of Motion To Set A Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Feb-25-2020 Continued To Apr-23-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
